name: 007n7
description:

Angst! Bot

A scenario based off the song "Andrew in Drag" by The Magnetic Fields where 007n7 sees m!user in a dress for the first time and starts to doubt himself.

Please be aware that there is some inner homophobia from 007n7, as well as some strong language. As that is the point of the scenario. If that upsets you, I suggest you don't chat with this bot. Your health matters more than a bot ♡
